美食摆摊系统都满级了，李昂隐藏身份回村过起了悠闲的小日子。
没成想...
李昂要结婚的消息不胫而走，全国的老食客都轰动了！
“李老板要结婚了？这可能是他的绝唱啊！”
“必须要去吃席，我是干房地产的，我给李老板随一套房，只求能再尝到李老板的手艺！”
“我是做汽车的，要不我送李老板一辆ultra？”
“我...我是当老师的，我能送李老板一套寒假作业吗？”
成千上万、身份各异的食客前往李昂的家乡吃席，无奈之下，李昂只能向身边人坦白。
“我婚礼大席得加点儿座位了...”
“不多，也就上万人吧！”
岳父、岳母、老爸、老妈：“李昂，你吹牛叉呢？”
派出所：“你是说，你婚礼大席还得报备？来消遣我们干警是吧！”
文旅：“少胡扯八道了，你知道我们县一年游客量才多少吗？”
李昂无奈：“你们都不相信我...但这吃席人数我还是往少了说的！”
......
婚礼当天，李昂看到黑压压的人群，才明白自己还是低估了来吃席的人流量。
啥玩意儿？
你们都想让我李昂给你们做席？
开玩笑，做大席和摆摊可是两回事儿！
系统：“叮，解锁大席制作功能！”
李昂：“*****！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c3ed7125acdb80bae662a3bb50806e53","author":"鸡胸肉猎人","author_id":"","book_id":"7602150520484006974","book_name":"结婚开席，全国吃货都疯了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7602150608283386430","read_count":"45598","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"216800"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"96","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,乡村,美食,开局,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8e2e7264b7a5912d95b7a8778447db32~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779363118&x-signature=3ghRiVP5%2Bf5CB01UW0%2FPnCfiEX8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"101244751554","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032219315822E975F878DEB5053763"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":3
